smoke.detail: sop kind: no code/env/smoke. README carries all gate-required sections (URL, INPUTS, OUTPUT FIELDS, LEDGER) plus SELECT and the fixed three-field output shape (pgp_brain_efflux NER class / Kp_uu_brain / fu_brain) with units + direction (efflux direction inverted vs the other two).

note: Web-only DruMAP P-gp brain SOP (organism=human); documents the one-session F-14 batch with t37 (renal) + CLint/Fa; passive/efflux triage read only, real CNS answer is experimental Kp,uu, BBB desirable not a gate; ledger shape matches core.ledger with source=DruMAP + run_by.
